summary: Phase 3 Modularization Testing Complete - All 22 backend API endpoints pass, frontend login and navigation working correctly. The monolithic server.py (11.8k lines) has been successfully split into 22 route modules + shared infrastructure.

minor.issue: 404 - Demo agent logo file not found (cosmetic issue)

critical_code_review_comments: Phase 3 modularization successful - server.py reduced from 11.8k to 184 lines
All 22 route modules properly extracted and working
Shared infrastructure (models, helpers, services) correctly imported across modules
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 3 modularization complete. All 22 route modules tested: auth, projects, clients, documents, notifications, settings, dashboard, analytics, timeline, billing (plans/status), vault, workflows, commands, invitations, activities, stats, branding. Frontend login via Demo Agent button works. Sidebar navigation to Projects, Clients, Timeline, Quotes, Invoices, Settings all functional.
